SobreMiPage.heroPara1: I firmly believe that good architecture improves the quality of life.
SobreMiPage.heroPara2: Choosing the right architect for your dream home means finding a skilled professional, but also trusting someone who will guide you through a very important decision-making phase.
SobreMiPage.heroPara3: Someone who knows how to listen and walk you through that uncharted — and often stressful! — territory that is renovation. And who keeps a watchful eye on overall costs.
SobreMiPage.heroHighlight: Without trust, no great project can come to life.
SobreMiPage.bioPara1: I am an architect with over 15 years of experience designing spaces that transform people's lives.
SobreMiPage.bioPara2: My passion for architecture was born from a fascination with the way spaces can influence our emotions and behaviours.
SobreMiPage.bioPara3: My approach combines functionality, aesthetics and sustainability, in a constant search for solutions that respect the environment and respond to each client's real needs.
SobreMiPage.bioPara4: I am a sunny person, one of those with a "thousand-watt smile", always able to find the positive side of every challenge.
SobreMiPage.bioPara5: My creativity is restless: when I'm not designing interiors, you'll find me creating analogue collages under the signature
SobreMiPage.timelineSubtitle: Trained in Milan, shaped by Spain. That's where I found my path.
SobreMiPage.timelineHighlight: Between Seville and Barcelona I lived a decade that changed the way I see architecture. There I understood that my true mission is
SobreMiPage.t1Desc: Architecture degree at the Politecnico di Milano.
SobreMiPage.t2Desc: First international experience at Vázquez Consuegra studio in Seville.
SobreMiPage.t3Desc: Collaboration with Exe Arquitectura in Barcelona.
SobreMiPage.t4Desc: Studio based in Bergamo and Seville, with projects in Italy and abroad.
SobreMiPage.valuesTitle: What I bring to my projects
SobreMiPage.v2Desc: To create emotional and vibrant spaces.
SobreMiPage.v3Desc: Because every centimetre counts and giving each object its own place keeps the home tidy and therefore more spacious.
SobreMiPage.v4Desc: I bring to Italy the warmth and energy I learned abroad, but above all the ability to listen.
SobreMiPage.ctaOverline: Studio based in Bergamo 🇮🇹 and Seville 🇪🇸
SobreMiPage.ctaTitle: Have an idea waiting to happen?
SobreMiPage.ctaSubtitle: Write to me, let's put it to the test and make it real.

ServiciosPage.heroSubtitle: From a quick consultation to a full turnkey project — choose the service that best fits your situation.
ServiciosPage.notSureTitle: Not sure which service is right for you?
ServiciosPage.notSureCta: Tell me what you have in mind and we'll figure it out together
ServiciosPage.howWeWorkSubtitle: Here are the steps of the 360° service
ServiciosPage.s1Desc: Geometric and photographic survey. We measure every corner of your space and digitise it into 2D drawings that form the basis for every subsequent step. If required, we will access official records to verify the compliance of the current state with the legal state.
ServiciosPage.s2PreliminaryText: Development of a concept layout with furnished floor plans where your dreams begin to take shape.
ServiciosPage.s2Def1: Sharing of the LOOKS & FEELS board: graphic research of concrete references and emotional inspirations to define the style of the project.
ServiciosPage.s2Def2: Presentation of the MATERIALS MOODBOARD to define colours and materials that follow the project's style.
ServiciosPage.s2Def3: Development of the winning proposal with all graphic documents needed to understand the spaces: floor plans, furnished elevations and 3D renderings, indicating the chosen furniture models and interior finishes.
ServiciosPage.s2Exec1: Development of detailed drawings and executive project graphics — demolitions, construction and systems — for requesting quotes and preparing the site dossier.
ServiciosPage.s2Exec2: Preparation of the catalogue furniture shopping list.
ServiciosPage.s2Exec3: Design of any bespoke furniture pieces.
ServiciosPage.s3Item1: Bill of quantities for masonry works.
ServiciosPage.s3Item3: Assistance with material and finish selection, including requesting samples and arranging showroom visits.
ServiciosPage.s3Item5: Site visits to check aesthetic execution in line with the finishes specified in the project.
ServiciosPage.s4Item1: Sharing of the estimated schedule and organisation of construction phases.
ServiciosPage.s4Item2: Site inspections, construction meetings and project compliance checks on technical, regulatory and administrative aspects.
ServiciosPage.s4Item3: Accounting review and settlement of measured works — Progress Certificate (SAL).
ServiciosPage.s4Item4: Assistance with invoice management for tax deductions and information on available bonuses.
ServiciosPage.s5Desc: Preparation of graphic documents and certified technical reports. Liaison with public authorities and assumption of civil and criminal responsibilities to obtain building permits. Cadastral update procedures and submission of the Final Works Completion notice.
ServiciosPage.getQuoteCta: Write to me to receive your free quote
ServiciosPage.hasHelpLabel: Already have someone supporting you on some of these steps?
ServiciosPage.hasHelpText: With me you can choose to be guided through just one of these steps!
ServiciosPage.ctaTitle: Write to me with no commitment
ServiciosPage.ctaSubtitle: Tell me about your project and what you need. I'll contact you within 48h to arrange a call and prepare a tailored quote.

archiadvice.title: ArchiAdvice — 60' video call
archiadvice.question: Looking for quick expert advice?
archiadvice.label: Right for you if:
archiadvice.f1: You have doubts about which colours/materials to use to achieve the style of your dreams
archiadvice.f2: You have ideas but don't know how to put them into practice
archiadvice.f3: You don't know how to arrange the furniture, what to keep, what to renew, how to position it, where to buy it
archiadvice.f4: You want to share your doubts about an interior design project that's keeping you up at night

consulenzaAcquisto.title: Purchase consultancy
consulenzaAcquisto.question: Thinking of buying a home?
consulenzaAcquisto.label: Right for you if:
consulenzaAcquisto.f1: You need an architect to review all documents to make sure everything is in order (habitability, land registry...)
consulenzaAcquisto.f2: You want a site visit with an architect and/or a shared assessment of the information to evaluate potential issues, discover the property's potential and how to make the most of every square metre
consulenzaAcquisto.f3: You want a rough idea of how much it would cost to renovate
consulenzaAcquisto.f4: You want to make an informed purchase

restyling.title: Restyling
restyling.question: Ready for a change?
restyling.label: Right for you if:
restyling.f1: You want to change the look of one or more rooms without necessarily moving walls
restyling.f2: You're renting and would like your home, shop or office to feel more like yours
restyling.f3: You want to change the furniture, optimise spaces by designing some bespoke elements
restyling.f4: The building work is done and now it's time to decorate, paint, furnish...

progettazione.title: Full architectural design 360°
progettazione.question: Need to renovate?
progettazione.label: A turnkey service designed to take every worry off your shoulders
progettazione.f1: Geometric survey and bespoke project tailored to your needs
progettazione.f2: Building permits, material selection and quote requests
progettazione.f3: Contractor management, financial monitoring and schedule
progettazione.f4: Artistic direction, construction management and project closure with cadastral update
